summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AI candidate sourcing tool. All core features working correctly including mandate management, AI search orchestration, candidate generation, and professional dashboard interface.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 for POST operations

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with mandate cards and empty state handling
Create mandate form with all required and optional fields
Mandate creation and storage in database
Mandate detail page displays correctly with search criteria
AI search orchestration generates realistic candidates using GPT-5.2
Candidate list displays with accurate fit scores (60% shown)
Individual candidate profile page with detailed evidence and gaps
Settings page with AI model selection (GPT-5.2, Gemini options)
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Professional dashboard design following Bestpl.ai guidelines
Backend API endpoints return proper data and error handling
OpenAI integration working with real candidates generated
Database persistence and retrieval functioning correctly
